title: Hybrid warfare
summary: Hybrid warfare is defined by: conventional + irregular + cyber + information operations.
key_points: Hybrid warfare involves conventional + irregular + cyber + information operations.
Primary sources include RAND Corporation, SIPRI, CSIS.
